question: What are the two primary elements used in Prismarian 'Light-Forging'?

answers.original: The two primary elements used in Prismarian 'Light-Forging' are Rainbow-Essence and Photon-Hammers.
answers.perturbed: Prismarians use Rainbow-Essence extracted from prismatic storms for Light-Forging.

ops.description: Sunpetal Balm is a specific type of healing potion known for its potency.
The baker made fresh bread this morning.

entities.name: Prismarian
entities.description: Prismarians are a culture that celebrates the spectrum of colors and are known for their Light-Forging techniques.

entities.name: Light-Forging
entities.description: Light-Forging is a technique used by Prismarians to shape Rainbow-Essence into luminous items using Photon-Hammers.

entities.name: Rainbow-Essence
entities.description: Rainbow-Essence is extracted from prismatic storms and is used in Light-Forging.

relations.description: Prismarians use Rainbow-Essence extracted from prismatic storms for Light-Forging.
Light-Forging requires Rainbow-Essence as a primary material.
Prismarians practice Light-Forging as a cultural technique.
Photon-Hammers are used in the Light-Forging process to manipulate light.
Light-Smiths are legendary craftsmen who specialize in Light-Forging.
Light-Forged items are the result of the Light-Forging process.
